title: Catherine, Princess of Wales Questions Digital Screens’ Role in Children’s Lives
summary_full: The princess published an essay Friday warning against a childhood “mediated by screens,” days after Britain announced a ban on social media for children under 16.
summary_public: The princess published an essay Friday warning against a childhood “mediated by screens,” days after Britain announced a ban on social media for children under 16.

GB.label: neutral
